nodes.label: Home Screen — Ritual setup with Mentex Tweaks dev panel
nodes.description: Home tab showing protection mode active ('3 apps fuera de tu mente': Instagram, TikTok, YouTube). Section 'Tu ritual de hoy' (0 de 1 completadas) with 'Meditación: Respira y vuelve a ti' (10 min). Section 'Mi aprendizaje del día' with CTA to add content from Explorar. Section 'Recordatorios' (3 activos): Meditar 5 min (checked), Hidratarse, Cierre del día, Llamar a mamá. Bottom nav: Home, Explorar, IA, Comunidad, Perfil. Overlaid Mentex Tweaks dev panel showing AUTH routes (Welcome skip splash, Login screen), ESTADO toggle (Inactivo/Activo), ACENTO color picker (neon green), ESTILO DE CARDS (Glass/Líneas/Plano), TIPOGRAFÍA (Geist/Inter/Manrope).
ui_elements: Protection mode banner: '3 apps fuera de tu mente' (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube)
Tu ritual de hoy section (0/1 completadas)
Meditation ritual card: 'Respira y vuelve a ti' (10 min) with play arrow
Mi aprendizaje del día section with add content CTA
Recordatorios section (3 activos) with list items
Bottom navigation bar (Home, Explorar, IA, Comunidad, Perfil)
AUTH routes shortcuts (Welcome skip splash, Login screen)
ESTILO DE CARDS toggle (Glass / Líneas / Plano)
nodes.app_state: Home tab active, protection mode on, 0/1 ritual items completed, Mentex Tweaks panel open
nodes.dev_panel: Mentex Tweaks overlay visible — design token / theme configuration at runtime

edges.description: Home screen recordatorios and ritual progress are reflected in the IA session summary (1 item pendiente en tu ritual, 2 recordatorios activos).
Both screens involve the ritual flow: Home shows post-session ritual progress, onboarding screen is the pre-session ritual setup entry point.
